findings.description: Section s6 contains code examples that prominently use the PascalCase entity classes SystemAccountEntity, UsersEntity, and UgroupSystemAccountEntity, but none of these class names appear in the hints array. Users asking about these specific classes would not be routed to this section.
findings.source_evidence: Source code in s6 (処理終了後のDB確認パターン) explicitly constructs and passes these three entity objects: `SystemAccountEntity sysAcct`, `UsersEntity users`, `UgroupSystemAccountEntity grpSysAcct` — all passed to `target.registerUser(sysAcct, users, grpSysAcct)`.
